zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble於1021年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾時，她的父親Guigues Ier d' Albon21歲，母親Adelaide de Beaujeu21歲。她和Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1091年12月27日在義大利皮蒙特托利諾卡尼奧享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble于1021年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯阿爾艾阿爾波- 達亞艾时，她的父亲Guigues Ier d' Albon21岁，母亲Adelaide de Beaujeu21岁。她和Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1091年12月27日在意大利皮蒙特托利諾卡尼奧享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: d'Albon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Jasvir, Dalbir, Jagdish.  German Alois, Ewald, Gerda.
Indian (Punjab): Sikh name, probably from Punjabi məṇḍ ‘skill’. It is based on the name of a Jat clan.

variants.name: Mandt
meanings: German and Norwegian (of Danish origin): from a short form of the ancient Germanic personal names beginning with Mant-, e.g. Mantwic, formed with Old High German mandjan ‘rejoice’ as the first element.

variants.name: Mander
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Balwinder, Bikram.
English: occupational name from Middle English mander, maunder ‘basket-maker’, a derivative of Middle English mande, maunde ‘basket’. Compare Mand .
German: habitational name from any of the places called Mandern, in Hesse and the Rhineland.

nameMeanings.name: Adelaide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin (via French Adélaïde ), from adal ‘noble’ + heid ‘kind, sort’. It was borne in the 10th century by the wife of the Holy Roman Emperor Otto the Great. She became regent after his death and was revered as a saint. The given name increased in popularity in England during the 19th century, when it was borne by the wife of King William IV; she was the daughter of the ruler of the German duchy of Saxe-Meiningen. The Australian city of Adelaide was named in her honour.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble was born in 1021, in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France, her father, Guigues Ier d' Albon, was 21 and her mother, Adelaide de Beaujeu, was 21. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais. She died on 27 December 1091, in Canischio, Turin, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble est née en 1021, à Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues Ier d' Albon, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Adelaide de Beaujeu, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais. Elle est décédée le 27 décembre 1091, à Canischio, Torino, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble 1021 in Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guigues Ier d' Albon 21 und ihre Mutter Adelaide de Beaujeu 21. Sie hatte mit Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 27. Dezember 1091 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Canischio, Torino, Piemonte, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble è nata il nel 1021 nel Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, sua padre, Guigues Ier d' Albon, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Adelaide de Beaujeu, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais. Morì il 27 dicembre 1091, nel Canischio, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelaide d'Albon and Grenobleが1021年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスアルドeチェアルボン- ド'アルドeチェで生まれた時，父Guigues Ier d' Albonは21歳，母Adelaide de Beaujeuは21歳であった。彼女はAmedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablaisとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1091年12月27日にイタリアピエモントトリノカニスチオで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble(이)가 1021년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 아드e체 알보- 드'아르드e체에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guigues Ier d' Albon(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelaide de Beaujeu(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1091년 12월 27일 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 캔이시오에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble nasceu em 1021, em Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues Ier d' Albon, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Adelaide de Beaujeu, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais. Ela faleceu em 27 de dezembro de 1091, em Canischio, Torino, Piemonte, Itália, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble родилась в 1021 г. в местности албон- д'ардeч, ардeч, рoне-алпесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Guigues Ier d' Albon было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Adelaide de Beaujeu, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais. Она умерла 27 декабря 1091 г. в местности канищио, торино, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelaide d'Albon and Grenoble nació en 1021, en Albon- d'Ardèche, Ardèche, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues Ier d' Albon, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Adelaide de Beaujeu, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Amedee de Savoy Comte de Maurienne et de Chablais. Murió el 27 de diciembre de 1091, en Canischio, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 70 años.
